name: Keep Them Sleeping
short_description: As an Emergency Pod Management Bot, it is your job to keep your crew alive and asleep in the case of an emergency.
detailed_description:
A sci-fi simulation game in which you take the role of the Emergency Pod Management Bot (EPMB) on a spaceship. The inhabitants of the medbay pods have been put into cryosleep due to the length of the journey. Somewhere along the way, disaster strikes, ripping apart the hull and disabling most of the automated systems. It is your job to keep the patients alive, healthy, and asleep.

Global Leaderboard

Do your best to place on the top 100 global leaderboard.

Local and Global Stats

The number of crew members that have lived and died is tracked for yourself as well as all of the players and displayed on the title screen. The global stats are for the past 60 days and are not live stats, they updates periodically.

Steam Friends

The default setting for the game will pull users from your Steam friends list to use as crew members. This option can be disabled in the settings.

Customize your character for your friends

In the crew manifest, if you customize your own character, then when your friends are playing they can see your customized character.

Customize your friend's characters

In the crew manifest, you can customize your friends' characters. Note that this will overwrite your friends' custom characters.
